agent.status: Two last small fixes: a signed-in user with no location set now gets a clear 'set your location' prompt on the map instead of a blank screen, and fixed a bug where clicking 'not interested' from an email got silently dropped if you'd moved out of the area.
agent.direction: That's the whole pre-launch UX sweep done - all three tiers plus invite-a-friend. Ready to regroup on what's next.
